title: pourthiaea pilosicalyx
intro: Pourthiaea pilosicalyx, also known as the hairy-leaved pourthiaea or hairy pourthiaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Pourthiaea pilosicalyx can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
